{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|ja|淤加美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|en}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime Kami}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami}}) and had {{ill|Mironami Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami Kami}}.
== Overview == Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]] Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|ja|淤加美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|en}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime Kami}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami Kami}}.
== Shrine == * '''Tahika Shrine''' ({{ill|Komono|ja|菰野町}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) ** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.
== References == * {{Cite book|author=[[Nobutsuna Saigō]]|title=Annotated Kojiki (古事記注釈)|date=August 2005|publisher=[[Chikuma Shobō]]|series=[[Chikuma Gakugei Bunko]]|volume=Vol. 3|isbn=4-480-08913-6}}

revision.text: {{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 多比理岐志麻流美神 | 世代名 = [[十七世神]] 第十一代 | 先代 = [[甕主日子神]] | 次代 = [[美呂浪神]] | 神祇 = <!-- 天神、地祇、天津神、国津神など -->[[国津神]] | 全名 = 多比理岐志麻流美神（タヒリキシマルミノカミ） | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = <!-- 太陽、月、山、海など司るもの --> | 陵所 = | 父 = 甕主日子神 | 母 = [[比那良志毘売]] | 親 = <!-- まぐあいによって生まれない場合 --> | 配偶者 = [[活玉前玉比売神]] | 子 = 美呂浪神 | 宮 = | 神社 = 多比鹿神社 | 記紀等 = [[古事記]] }} '''多比理岐志麻流美神'''（タヒリキシマルミ）は、[[日本神話]]に登場する[[神 (神道)|神]]。 == 概要 == 『古事記』の[[大国主神]]の系譜に5世の孫神として登場するが、神名のみで事跡も語られていないため、その名義も不明である。[[十七世神]]（とおまりななよのかみ）の一柱である[[国津神]]。「タヒリキ」・「シマルミ」から平坦な島と海と捉えることもできるが真相は不明。 == 系譜 == [[画像:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|大国主の系図（『古事記』による）。青は男神、赤は女神、黄は性別不詳]] [[大国主神]]の4世孫の甕主日子神が[[淤加美神]]の娘の比那良志毘売を娶って生んだ神で、[[ヒヒラギノソノハナマヅミ|比々羅木之其花麻豆美神]]の娘の活玉前玉比売神を娶って美呂浪神を産んだ。 == 祀る神社 == * 多比鹿神社（[[三重県]][[三重郡]][[菰野町]]田光） - 主祭神 == 参考文献 == * <!-- さいごう -->{{Cite book|和書 |title=古事記注釈 |date=2005年8月 |publisher=[[筑摩書房]] |author=[[西郷信綱]] |series=[[ちくま学芸文庫]] |isbn=4-480-08913-6 |volume=第3巻}} == 外部リンク == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/tahirikishimaruminokami/ 多比理岐志麻流美神 – 國學院大學 古典文化学事業] * [http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e5%a4%9a%e6%af%94%e9%b9%bf%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/ 三重県神社庁教化委員会 » 多比鹿神社] {{日本神話}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たひりきしまるみのかみ}} [[Category:国津神]] [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:十七世神]]

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. '''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==

Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in [[:en:Japanese mythology|Japanese mythology]].

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ([[:en:Komono|Komono]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]])
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ({{ill|Komono|en|Komono|WD=Q1204099|lt=Komono}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}})
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ({{ill|Komono|en|Komono|WD=Q1204099|lt=Komono}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}})
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

'''Tahirikishimarumi no Kami''' (多比理岐志麻流美神, タヒリキシマルミ) is a deity mentioned in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ({{ill|Komono|en|Komono|WD=Q1204099|lt=Komono}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}})
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==
* '''Tahika Shrine''' ({{ill|Komono|en|Komono|WD=Q1204099|lt=Komono}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}})
** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.

{{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was his father. This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Appearing in the genealogical record of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'', Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is described as a fifth-generation descendant of Ōkuninushi. However, the deity's name is mentioned without any associated myths or deeds, leaving its significance and etymology ambiguous. Based on the components "Tahiriki" and "Shimarumi," the name may imply a flat island and sea, but its exact meaning is uncertain.

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Tahirikishimarumi no Kami is the child of {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the fourth-generation descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}. Tahirikishimarumi no Kami marries {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and has a child, {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Shrine ==

** The main shrine dedicated to Tahirikishimarumi no Kami.
